provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a state where the user has already requested and then confirmed a pending-order payment-method change after the assistant surfaced the exact replacement card and refund consequence.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. Scores favor the direct pending-order payment update because identity, order lookup, and explicit user confirmation are already complete.
notes: query comes directly from the selected visible user message, not from hidden task text
